{{Quote|Spare me your lies. I am well aware that you have been using the funds I allocated for the Ryloth mission to fund your own vendetta against the Jedi.|[[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]|<ref name="Republic 66">[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]]</ref>}}
'''Kh'aris Fenn''' was a [[Color/Legends|white]]-skinned [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] in the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was the son of [[Ro Fenn]], leader of [[Clan Fenn]], and had been exiled from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] for heinous crimes.

==Biography==
[[File:KharisFennsDeath.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Fenn about to be executed by [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]].]]

Fenn was part of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] failed plan to take control of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], and was also responsible for hiring the [[Crimson Nova]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to attack the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Unfortunately, he hired the bounty hunters using Dooku's funds, which the Count considered stealing. This and the fact that he hired bounty hunters within [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] territory, raising the Jedi's ire and laying a trail that led to Fenn, destroying Dooku's plans for Ryloth, proved to be the last straw. Dooku sent his acolyte [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] (disguised as [[Rh'ajah Fenn]]) to dispose of Fenn. He was [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] and Quinlan Vos subsequently made a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] for others to view as a testament and a warning of the fate of those who betrayed Dooku and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

Fenn's death was one of the final tests set before Vos, by Dooku, before he had become a trustworthy [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]].
